default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review AI-generated content and align on the publishing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Strategy:** Publish two more articles on the legacy Storyblock site to gather performance data before the new Framer site launches at the end of November.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Content Direction:** Focus AI-generated content on top-of-funnel topics (e.g., use cases, definitions), avoiding core positioning articles and direct sales pitches.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**Immediate Focus:** Prioritize seven "refresher" articles this week, as the pipeline for them is nearly ready and provides an immediate content runway.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**New Initiative:** Explore a programmatic content project with Growth X to build a large library of templated assets (e.g., prompt packs).](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

## Topics

### Publishing & Performance Strategy

  - [Three articles are live on the legacy Storyblock site, with publish dates backdated to avoid appearing as a sudden, disparate batch.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Publishing two more articles on Storyblock will provide performance data sooner than waiting for the Framer site launch.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [The Framer publishing pipeline is live and appears functional; Franki will verify the CMS integration.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**Imagery Blocker:** Awaiting Mark's input on a new image pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [**Backup Plan:** Use and touch up existing abstract Storyblock thumbnails. This ensures publishing continues without delay.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**Tagging:** Articles are currently tagged by "cluster" to align with Looker cohorts. Franki will consider if additional tags are needed.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

### AI Content Review & Direction

  - [**Core Principle:** AI content must be top-of-funnel, speaking in the customer's language. Avoid HX-specific thought leadership or sales pitches.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**"Excel vs. \[Something\]" Article:** Approved for publish.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [**Edits:** Remove the AI's "integrated platform" category label and cut direct sales pitches.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**"Will AI Take Over Actuary Jobs?" Article:** Approved for publish.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
      - [**Edits:** Remove the final HX pitch and CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**"10 Best Insurance Underwriting Tools..." Article:** Paused/Killed.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Too risky; the topic is too close to HX's core positioning and valuation.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**"How AI and Data are Transforming..." Article:** Needs edits.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
      - [**Edits:** Reframe as a "Top Use Cases" post with a consistent structure for each use case (e.g., underwriting, claims, CX).](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [**"How Insurance Decision Intelligence..." Article:** Paused/Killed.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The AI struggles with this core thought leadership topic. A refresh of the existing "Complete Guide to Pricing Decision Intelligence" article is already in the queue and will cover this ground.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

### Content Pipeline & Workflow

  - [**Immediate Focus:** Prioritize seven "refresher" articles this week, as the pipeline for them is nearly ready.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Workflow Change:** A new "Frankie Final Polish" column will be added to the content tracker.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [**Process:** Growth X edits → David reviews → Franki polishes → Growth X publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [**Programmatic Content:** Jacob will provide an update Friday on a new project to build a large library of templated assets (e.g., prompt packs).](https://fathom.video/share/nj-G4mUWJazD68VkAnkcnR4Mebjp2KUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
